doc_content.summary: The stark-claude-md-improver skill automatically audits and enhances CLAUDE.md instruction files across a project's hierarchy, evaluating them for clarity, completeness, accuracy, and AI effectiveness before interactively applying improvements.
key_features: Hierarchical file discovery (home, org, project, subdirectories)
Cross-referencing with actual project state to identify stale content
Interactive reporting and direct application of optimizations
Observability tracking of metrics and scores

alt_text: A workflow visualization of the stark-claude-md-improver skill showing the 5-step process of discovery, dimensional analysis, report generation, interactive user prompting, and file modification.
